packages.hypothesis: Boros Charm appears across the stronger Lorehold variants as cheap instant-speed protection/pressure absorption. This same-lane triage tests whether lowering a five-mana pressure-response slot into a two-mana modal protection spell improves the life-zero combat failures without cutting ramp, topdeck engines, High Noon, Hexing Squelcher, Storm Herd, or the protection shell.
